subject: docs(guides): write comprehensive USER_GUIDE.md and TESTING_GUIDE.md
body:
Both files were empty stubs with placeholder content. USER_GUIDE now covers
all features: builder UI, 13 field types, conditional logic, publishing,
embedding, import, responses, CSV export, PWA, and mobile. TESTING_GUIDE
has 18 manual test scenarios plus a regression checklist.

Tags: documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
